name: shoplux-ecommerce
description: ShopLux — Full-Stack E-commerce Monorepo (Server + Web Client + Admin Dashboard)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=apps/server" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/admin
scripts.install:all: npm install --workspace=apps/server && npm install --workspace=apps/web && npm install --workspace=apps/admin
